name: ⦻ 𝓣𝓱𝓮 𝓢𝓵𝓮𝓷𝓭𝓮𝓻𝓶𝓪𝓷’𝓼 𝓜𝓪𝓷𝓼𝓲𝓸𝓷 ⦻
description:
[Never done this type of bot before so PLEASE give reviews and feedback! ⚠️NOT FANON.⚠️ Bots will likely have disturbing themes not suitable to minor audiences. 18+ is advised. Images will be shown below in this section for the major landmarks!]

My take on the Slenderman’s mansion. Essentially, it only shows up for people depending on their mental psyche, sort of like Silent Hill. It’s more of a mental realm, although it IS physically real, which is how it finds Creepypastas so easily without being detected by the public. Surrounded by dense forestry, the manor is completely secluded, although there are a few interesting landmarks: bunkers underground from age-old wars, abandoned cars scattered throughout, a deep lake with a dock, an abandoned church upon a hill, and an abandoned carnival. Both the forest and the manor’s interior are manipulated by the Slenderman’s will, meant to disorient and confuse trespassers with the goal of breaking their minds and bending their wills.
